message:
feat(util): add SafeSliceFromEnd, GetLastNLines, and CountNonEmptyLines shared helpers

These three text utility functions were previously duplicated across
multiple packages (agent/patterns, robot/probe, swarm/auto_respawner,
status/errors) with varying implementations. Centralizing them in
internal/util eliminates redundancy and ensures consistent behavior:

- SafeSliceFromEnd: Truncates a string to at most maxLen bytes from the
  end, ensuring the cut lands on a valid rune boundary. Used by the
  agent parser (RawSample) and health detector (recent output window).

- GetLastNLines: Efficiently returns the last N lines by scanning
  backward from the end of the string, avoiding the O(n) cost of
  strings.Split + slice arithmetic that was used in 6+ call sites.

- CountNonEmptyLines: Counts lines with non-whitespace content. Was
  independently implemented in robot/probe.go and robot/status_enrich.go
  with identical logic -- now shared.

These are foundational changes that subsequent commits depend on, as
they replace package-local implementations with these canonical versions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
